login.metaDescription: Access your Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral account.
login.title: Log in
login.description: Access your modules and pick up where you left off.

signup.metaDescription: Join the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. $25 USD/month.
signup.title: Create your account
signup.description: Permanent access to the modules you purchase. Advance at your own pace.

enrollmentClosed.title: Enrollment opens on {date}
enrollmentClosed.body: The first cohort of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral opens enrollment on {launchDate}. Come back on that date to submit your admission and secure your spot.

resetRequest.metaDescription: Request a link to recover your Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral password.
resetRequest.title: Recover your password
resetRequest.description: We'll send a link to your email so you can create a new one.
resetRequest.successBody: If the email exists in our records, you'll receive a link to create a new password. It may take 1–2 minutes.

updatePassword.title: Create your new password
updatePassword.description: It must be at least 8 characters long.
updatePassword.expiredBody: The recovery link is no longer valid. Request a new one to continue.

subscribe.metaDescription: $25 USD a month. Full access to the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. Cancel anytime.
subscribe.ogDescription: Full access to the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral for $25 USD/month. 72 modules in 18 months · 1 module per week · cancel anytime.
subscribe.title: Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral
subscribe.intro: A single monthly subscription gives you access to the complete 18-month diploma. You receive a new module every week (Tuesday 00:01). Cancel anytime from your dashboard — your progress is saved.

included.item1: Personal weekly calendar: 1 module per week for 72 weeks
included.item2: Live MasterClass by event (minimum 1 guaranteed per month)
included.item4: Personalized grading of your activation in Dr. Max's voice (48h)
included.item5: Private community of pastors in training
included.item6: Downloadable material per module (PDFs, templates, extra resources)
included.item7: Certificate, badge, and a new dimension upon completing each block

subscribe.paymentNote: Processed by Stripe. No contract. Cancel in one click anytime.

enrollmentClosed.title: Enrollment opens on {date}
enrollmentClosed.body: The first cohort of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral opens enrollment on {launchDate}. On that date you'll be able to activate your subscription and secure your spot.

subscribeSuccess.title: Welcome to the diploma!
subscribeSuccess.body: Your subscription is being activated. In a few seconds you'll receive an email from Stripe confirming your payment. From your dashboard you'll be able to start Phase 1.
subscribeSuccess.accessNote: Don't see your access yet? Reload the dashboard in 10 seconds.
